executive_summary: Build failure detected for repository scib_new on branch main. The GitHub Actions workflow run 22727459067 failed during execution. Based on the failure metadata, this appears to be a build workflow execution failure that requires detailed log analysis to determine the root cause. Common failure patterns include compilation errors, test failures, dependency resolution issues, or configuration problems.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow Execution Failure
errors.description: The build workflow failed to complete successfully. The action URL indicates a workflow run failure that prevented the build from completing.
errors.error_message: Build workflow failed - see action URL for details
errors.root_cause: Workflow execution failure detected. Possible causes include: (1) Workflow configuration errors in .github/workflows/build.yml, (2) Missing or incorrect environment variables, (3) Authentication/permission issues, (4) Resource constraints or timeout issues, (5) Dependency resolution failures during workflow setup.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No artifacts generated. Blocks all downstream processes including testing, deployment, and release activities.

errors.title: Insufficient Error Details in Build Logs
errors.description: The build failure log does not contain detailed Maven error output, making root cause analysis difficult.
errors.error_message: Build failed - see action URL for details
errors.root_cause: The build logging mechanism may not be capturing detailed Maven output. This could be due to: (1) Logging configuration issues in the workflow, (2) Early workflow termination before Maven execution, (3) Log capture mechanism failure.
errors.impact: Reduced visibility into actual build failures. Increases time to diagnose and resolve issues. May require manual inspection of GitHub Actions logs.

recommended_actions.description: Navigate to https://github.com/loginkarun/scib_new/actions/runs/22727459067 and review the complete workflow execution logs to identify the specific failure point.
Review .github/workflows/build.yml for syntax errors, missing steps, or incorrect configuration. Ensure all required secrets and environment variables are properly configured.
Update the build workflow to capture and store detailed Maven output logs. Add verbose logging flags (-X or -e) to Maven commands for better diagnostics.
Configure the workflow to upload build logs as artifacts for easier access and analysis. This ensures logs are available even if the workflow fails early.

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Build failure recorded in logs/build_failure_attempt-1.json at workflow run 22727459067
compliance_notes.security_impact: No immediate security concerns identified. Ensure workflow secrets are properly configured and not exposed in logs.
compliance_notes.regulatory_compliance: Build failure does not impact compliance status. However, prolonged build failures may affect audit requirements for continuous integration practices.

next_steps: Access GitHub Actions workflow logs directly via the action URL
Identify specific Maven error messages or workflow step failures
Apply targeted fixes based on error category
Update error analysis report with detailed findings
